env._comment: Optional but recommended: pin the workspace root so the bridge cannot access indexes outside the opened project.

search.description: Find specific code, files, or functions with natural language

ask.description: Answer architectural and conceptual questions about a project

graph.description: Call graph analysis: callers, callees, impact, semantic trace

build.description: Async KB build: index, enrich, wiki, hierarchy

manage.description: Project lifecycle: vacuum, dedup, jobs, reload
